name: cgel
description: Contract-Gated Evidence Loop — sealed task contracts with scope-gated edits, approvals by one AskUserQuestion tap (seal, unblock, overrides, git push) instead of typed commands, several tasks open in parallel per repo, a frozen governance bundle, hash-chained verification evidence with watch-scoped staleness, budgeted iterations with a default-same failure guard, built-in blocking review rules (impacted code, tech debt, comments, secrets) judged by an opus verifier, a design challenger that questions weak plans before sealing, an evidence-gated PASS with sanitized attestations, and commits/PRs authored solely by you — never AI-attributed.
